literature_gap_log: CPR, UBC34 are accessory enzymes treated as sources; upstream regulation not in poplar lignin literature.
NAC156, NAC157 downstream targets captured only for CCoAOMT1; other targets (cellulose, xylan) not included as they do not affect S/G.

snd1_A2_IR and vnd6_C1_IR are alternative-splice variants of SND1/VND6 — they are RNA products of the same loci; in BUILDER they should be 'is_source: true' but that is biologically imprecise. Modelling their source as the parent gene is acceptable.
Wounding → MPK6 edge captures the one environmental input documented in poplar lignin literature; other environmental inputs (light, nutrient) have no poplar-specific lignin S/G evidence.
miR397a and miR166 upstream regulators (pri-miRNA processing factors) not documented in poplar lignin literature.

Many second-tier MYB TFs (MYB90, MYB121, MYB128, MYB161, MYB174, MYB216, MYB74, MYB152) have no direct upstream edges in the extracted literature; BUILDER should either flag them as sources OR expect SND1/MYB3/20-driven activation (orthology from Arabidopsis).
